title: Upgraded Shulkers
body:
Upgraded Shulkers is a mod for fabric adding bigger upgradable shulker boxes

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1xk5Tmht/images/61220a9dfd64d4ef297723ec367c85d62ebfe032.png)

Tiers:
-   Iron : 54 slots
-   Gold : 81 slots
-   Diamond: 108 slots
-   Netherite:108 slots, blast and lava proof

Upgrades:
-   Hopper: Applicable to all upgraded shulkers. When this upgrade is installed on a shulker, all items picked up that are also inside of this shulker will automatically be stored inside.
-   Void: Applicable to all upgraded shulkers. When this upgrade is installed on a shulker, all items picked up that are also inside of this shulker will automatically be deleted.

  
Thank you to SirBroseph for coming up with the idea, and for creating all of the textures for this mod.

All upgraded shulkers are compatible with [QuickShulker](https://modrinth.com/mod/quickshulker)!
